title: Section 33
content: The expenditure in respect of salaries and allowances of the Judges of the common High Court shall be allocated amongst the States of 1 [Arunachal Pradesh, Mizoram and Nagaland] and the Union in such proportion as the President may, by order, determine.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 7, ibid., for "Manipur, Meghalaya, Nagaland and Tripura" (w.e.f. 23-3-2013).
